loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
SELECT PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract) as tdate_begining_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.start_keep_date ,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer , sc_lon_m_contract.bank_code, sc_lon_m_contract.bank_acc_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan , sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint ,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id , sc_com_m_branch.branch_name , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, FPA_LON_REQ_REFINANCE_AMT(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no) as refinance ,sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status ,sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.type_pay_money ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.fee_amount ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ) as loan_type_description
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_com_m_branch --security_users WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type ) --and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.entry_id = security_users.names) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.approve_status = '2' ) --and (sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '2')
/*WHERE*/

r_ktm_loan_paid_coll_nest.sql: SELECT SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.COLLATERAL_TYPE_CODE, SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.REF_OWN_NO, SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL.COLLATERAL_DESCRIPTION FROM SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_COLL WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' )

r_ktm_loan_req_old_loan_nest.sql: SELECT SC_LON_M_LOAN_HISTORY.PRINCIPAL_BALANCE_OF_LOAN, SC_LON_M_LOAN_HISTORY.INTEREST_AMOUNT, SC_LON_M_LOAN_HISTORY.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO, SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.PERIOD_PAYMENT_AMOUNT, SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.LOAN_TYPE, SC_LON_M_RULE.REF_CONTRACT_TYPE FROM SC_LON_M_LOAN_HISTORY, SC_LON_M_CONTRACT, SC_LON_M_RULE WHERE ( SC_LON_M_LOAN_HISTORY.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO = SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.LOAN_CONTRACT_NO ) and ( SC_LON_M_CONTRACT.LOAN_TYPE = SC_LON_M_RULE.LOAN_TYPE ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_history.clear_target = '0' ) )

r_ktm_loan_paid_mpaid_nest.sql: SELECT "SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_MULTI_PAID"."SEQ_NO", ( CASE sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id when 'TRB' then 'โอน ธ.' ||''||pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) when 'TRD' then 'โอน สอ.'||''||pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no , 'XXX-XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) else trim(sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name) end ) as case_money_type_name , "SC_COM_M_UCF_MONEY_TYPE"."MONEY_TYPE_ID", "SC_COM_M_UCF_MONEY_TYPE"."MONEY_TYPE_NAME", "SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_MULTI_PAID"."BANK_CODE", "SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_MULTI_PAID"."BANK_ACC_NO", "SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_MULTI_PAID"."PAID_AMOUNT" FROM "SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_MULTI_PAID", "SC_COM_M_UCF_MONEY_TYPE" WHERE ( "SC_COM_M_UCF_MONEY_TYPE"."MONEY_TYPE_ID" = "SC_LON_M_CONTRACT_MULTI_PAID"."TYPE_PAY_MONEY" ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = {0} ) )
